bundle.shortDescription: LUDIARS local-first chat with WebRTC/QUIC realtime + Synergos async
bundle.longDescription: Susurrus: Cernere-authenticated local-first chat with hybrid delivery (WebRTC+QUIC realtime when active, Synergos P2P async when dormant). Markdown-canonical with SQLite cache, Discord/Slack-style forums, window detach + overlay SDK.
